=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Pershing Auditorium
Lincoln, Nebraska
23 April 2001

this recording seems derived from LB-5070:
begin of d1t1 missing with cut at d1t1 0:02; mic static d1t9 0:24; begin of t12 cut  and I found, at the end of tracks 11, few second of silence


CD1

1. Duncan And Brady (trad.)
2. Mr. Tambourine Man
3. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
4. Just Like Tom Thumb's Blues
5. Tryin' To Get To Heaven
6. Seeing The Real You At Last
7. Boots Of Spanish Leather
8. Visions Of Johanna
9. Don't Think Twice, It's All Right
10. Things Have Changed
11. Drifter's Escape

CD2

12. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
13. Love Sick
14. Like A Rolling Stone
15. If Dogs Run Free
16. All Along The Watchtower
17. I Shall Be Released
18. Highway 61 Revisited
19. Blowin' In The Wind
20. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
